programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Can new expert Louise Gostelow beat veteran road tripper Phillip Serrell at auction? She spends every penny while Phil sees real value in a lady's head and a man's torso.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil and Louise head to Lincolnshire to search for antiques yet find two rare animals, a King Charles Spaniel and some very cute lambs. Will a Lincoln auction bring good fortune?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Dealer Stephanie Connell and auctioneer Charlie Ross, plus their Hillman Super Minx, browse around Kent. Expect biscuit tins, a milking stool, and an arts and crafts mirror.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Stephanie Connell and Charlie Ross are antiques hunting from Dunstable to Wotton under Edge. Charlie bags an ancient naval relic, while Steph springs for something even rustier. But will their plans pay off at the Gloucestershire auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Dealer Stephanie Connell and auctioneer Charlie Ross take their Hillman Super Minx towards Wales. Steph plays skittles, while Charlie gets vertigo.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell travel around Lincolnshire in their Sunbeam Alpine. Natasha finds an item that brings back memories, while Philip has his eye on something that will help keep his scarf clean at mealtime.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell visit the antiques emporia of the east. After losing her mojo, Natasha takes a fancy to a rather grisly souvenir, while Philip has grand designs on the makings of a small house.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell are in The Peaks! Philip looks for divine inspiration from an undertaker. Natasha puts all her eggs in one basket and needs to do a shopping spree against the clock.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp finds a big brassy item in a tiny shop and negotiates with a Bond villain in training. Philip Serrell visits an emporium in grand surroundings and gets his hands on some unsavory prehistoric lumps.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: There's only 60 pounds separating Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell. Natasha goes out of her comfort zone when considering some 18th-century pottery. Philip chews over more prehistoric stuff.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to the beautiful setting of Pembroke Castle in West Wales; objects featured include a beguilingly rare sapphire ring that changes color in different light, and Pope Pius XII's papal hat.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts head to Britain's first sky scraper, the art deco Senate House in the heart of Bloomsbury; objects brought in include stained-glass panels found in a skip, the hoof of Lord Cardigan's charger, plus a French bracelet.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head for the beautiful gardens of Trelissick near Truro in Cornwall; objects under examination by the experts include a bust of Churchill found at the bottom of a lake and a group of medals owned by a proud grandson.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce heads to the medieval manor of Ightham Mote near Sevenoaks; family heirlooms pored over by the experts include a set of gold and porcelain false teeth from the 1850s, Sir Walter Scott's walking cane, and two very old cricket bats.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts set up camp at Ightham Moat near Sevenoaks in Kent; among the treasures brought to camera are a gold ring containing a lock of Byron's hair, and a boot sale find of two Chinese paintings.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts meet visitors bringing family heirlooms to the 18th century cotton mill of New Lanark; treasures featured include a pearl necklace bought cheaply at a boot sale, and a valuable clock found in a flea market.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures brought to the cameras include diamond jewels found hidden in an upholstered chair, a claret jug rescued from the pawn shop, and a banner for Britain's oldest subscription library founded in 1741.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects featured include a communion book originally owned by the poet Wilfred Owen, an Aston Martin sports car first driven by an RAF Group Captain in World War II, and a well-preserved finely embroidered stumpwork box from the 17th century.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team travel to the Lake District, where there's an eclectic mix of objects; this includes a writing desk from the Tsar's Palace bought after the Russian Revolution, over 100 vintage fire helmets, and Edwardian weight lifting equipment.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce introduces unscreened gems from the 39th series of the show; finds include a garnet and diamond cross believed by the owner to have been gifted by Marie Antoinette en route to the guillotine.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team roll out their 40th anniversary tour as they scour the country in search of hidden treasures; Castle Howard in Yorkshire is their first stop as thousands of visitors raid their attics to bring in family heirlooms.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Over 2,000 visitors queue to see Fiona Bruce and the experts sheltering under the canopy at Minehead Station, which is run by West Somerset Railway; objects brought in include a bracelet made from jewels once owned by the last of the Romanovs.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Nymans garden near Crawley. Objects exciting the experts include what is reputedly Mallory's axe from his 1922 ascent of Everest, a sofa that starred in a classic movie, plus a gift from an old boyfriend.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de dos agentes encubiertos de la DEA y la desaparición de un tercero, el UAC se suma a la NSA para investigar si una red clandestina de drogas por Internet está involucrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de pasar meses rastreando a su objetivo, Tony se queda con la sangre de un agente del NCIS en sus manos y es tarea de Gibbs ayudarlo a armar las piezas del rompecabezas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre una sorpresa impactante cuando un joven marine llega a su fiesta de bienvenida con una herida mortal de puñalada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El límite entre la vida personal y profesional de McGee se difumina cuando NCIS descubre una conexión entre su abuela y el asesinato de un teniente de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC implementa una estrategia elaborada para tratar de acabar con el anillo de sicarios “Los doce sucios”, con Reid jugando un papel central.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran cuerpos en lugares públicos alrededor de Boston, el UAC investiga si un taxi o servicio de transporte que las víctimas utilizaron antes de su muerte podría guiar hasta el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC busca un móvil y un sospechoso cuando las víctimas se encuentran en los inodoros de las paradas de camiones a lo largo de las carreteras en todo el sur.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies halt a burglary in progress. A truck is pulled over for stolen plates and officers question how it can start with a house key. A RV is no home for a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: El circo de Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina viaja a Monterrey para trabajar en un circo y ayudar a su sobrina a recuperar un terreno que ha heredado, el cual esconde un tesoro enterrado por un coronel revolucionario.

programme.title: El bufete
programme.desc: Mitch es un abogado atraído por una gran firma con la promesa de un futuro brillante. Las cosas no salen según lo planeado después de que se ve envuelto en un caso de asesinato.

programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: El bufete

programme.title: Días de trueno

programme.title: Rescatando al soldado Ryan
programme.desc: ¿Por qué están ocho hombres arriesgando sus vidas para salvar solo una? Rodeados de las brutales realidades de la guerra, cada hombre busca su propia respuesta, y la fuerza para triunfar sobre un futuro incierto con honor, decencia y valentía.

programme.title: Tiempo de morir
programme.desc: Después de cumplir 18 años por matar a un hombre en un duelo, un hombre regresa a su ciudad natal decidido a llevar una vida normal, pero los hijos del hombre al que mató están empeñados en vengarse.

programme.title: Arcángel
programme.desc: El profesor Fluke Kelso se encuentra con un misterioso anciano vinculado a Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: La fuerza de la verdad
programme.desc: Henry es un abogado exitoso que necesita ganar a toda costa, incluso si debe sacrificar a su familia. Pero un disparo detiene el veloz ascenso de Henry, dejándolo incapacitado y sin recuerdos de su vida anterior.

programme.title: Rescatando al soldado Ryan
programme.desc: ¿Por qué están ocho hombres arriesgando sus vidas para salvar solo una? Rodeados de las brutales realidades de la guerra, cada hombre busca su propia respuesta, y la fuerza para triunfar sobre un futuro incierto con honor, decencia y valentía.

programme.title: Cuenta pendiente
programme.desc: Veinte años después de un robo fallido, tres estafadores secuestran a un paciente con amnesia para refrescar su memoria y encontrar el dinero que se perdió hace tanto tiempo.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: Tirador
programme.desc: Decidido a probar su inocencia en una traición, Bob Lee Swagger se encuentra ahora en una tensa carrera contra todas las fuerzas de la ley de los Estados Unidos y contra una organización oscura que quiere verlo muerto.

programme.title: Venganza
programme.desc: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra escapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: La suburban dorada

programme.title: Ronin

programme.title: Una película de miedo

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policia? 33 1/3: el insulto final
programme.desc: La noche de los Óscar(r). ¿Puede alguien echar ese zoquete? ¡Esperen! No es un zoquete cualquiera, es el Tte. Frank Drebin. ¡Y se coló para detener un atentado terrorista!

programme.title: Feo de día, lindo de noche
programme.desc: Un hombre que desea ser lindo para poder vivir una vida de privilegio en una sociedad que le atribuye a la belleza el éxito. Pero no sabe que su gran deseo se convertirá en su mayor desafío.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policía? 2 1/2
programme.desc: Frank Drebin (Leslie Nielsen) adora el misterio. ¿Por qué estamos aquí? ¿Hay vida después del sexo? Sí, aborda los grandes temas, y el más grande es detener a Quentin Hapsburg (Robert Goulet) en su plan para destruir el medio ambiente.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de mejores amigos se reúne durante un eclipse lunar para compartir una cena íntima en la elegante casa de Eva y Antonio, sospechan que se trata de otra noche cualquiera hasta que la anfitriona les propone un juego.

programme.title: Mariachi gringo
programme.desc: Edward es un joven que vive en un pequeño pueblo estadounidense y encuentra la pasión en la música tradicional mexicana, por lo que viajará a Guadalajara con un solo objetivo: convertirse en mariachi.

programme.title: Scream. Grita antes de morir
programme.desc: Luego de una serie de muertes misteriosas, un grupo de fanáticos de películas de terror se vuelven el blanco de un asesino enmascarado en este thriller exitoso del director Wes Craven, que reinventó el género del terror.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: En la universidad, Sidney Prescott creyó que al fin había dejado atrás el terror... hasta que un asesino imitador empieza a interpretar una secuela real donde nadie está a salvo ni libre de sospecha.

programme.title: Scream 3
programme.desc: La primera película estableció las reglas. En la secuela, la apuesta es mayor. En la tercera entrega de la exitosa franquicia "Scream", todo es posible. Es un juego insidioso de caos de película de terror con sorprendentes giros y vueltas.

programme.title: Los usurpadores de cuerpos
programme.desc: Bajo el amparo de las tinieblas, una ciudad duerme sin sospechar que una forma de vida alienígena está formándose para desatar un terror indescriptible, en uno de los grandes thrillers de suspenso clásicos del cine.

programme.title: Candyman: El terror
programme.desc: Secuela de "Candyman", ambientada en Nueva Orleans. Un maestro de escuela descubre el vínculo entre una serie de asesinatos misteriosos y el espíritu de un esclavo asesinado injustamente.

programme.title: Cambiapieles
programme.desc: Un niño de 12 años y su madre se convierten en el objetivo de dos manadas de hombres lobo en guerra, cada una con intenciones y motivos diferentes.

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum plays to perfection an alcoholic but gutsy sheriff who relentlessly battles the dark side of the wild West, ruthless cattle barons and crooked “businessmen.”

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: The Cowboy And The Indians
programme.desc: Gene Autry runs in to opposition when he tries to aid starving Navajos. The Chief is found unconscious and his necklace gone. Lakohna, the successor, is blamed. Gene and Lakohna join to seek justice.

programme.title: Beyond The Purple Hills
programme.desc: Gene Autry becomes the new Sheriff after bank robbers kill the former sheriff. When Judge Beaumont is murdered, evidence points to the judge's wild son. Believing the young man, Gene tries to help.

programme.title: Cow Town
programme.desc: Barbed wire is brought to the open range in a secret plan is to bring sheep into the territory, and the ranchers are urged to fight against it. Gene Autry makes certain that nothing shady is going on.

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches
programme.desc: Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what’s left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang’s heyday may be far behind them, but there’s still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Winner of ten Academy Awards including Best Picture, this electrifying musical sets the ageless tragedy of 'Romeo and Juliet' in the slums of 1950s New York and stars Natalie Wood, Richard Beymer, Russ Tamblyn, Rita Moreno, and George Chakiris.

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Audrey Hepburn's portrayal of a modern-day princess, rebelling against the royal obligations, who explores Rome on her own. This romantic comedy ranks as one of the most enjoyable films of all times.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: Bogie and Holden are the mega-rich Larrabee brothers of Long Island. Bogie’s all work, Holden’s all playboy. But when Sabrina (Hepburn), daughter of the family’s chauffeur, returns from Paris, the stage is set for some family fireworks.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: In order to inherit $7,000,000, an ex-soldier must spend $1,000,000 in two months' time.

programme.title: The Rat Race
programme.desc: A saxophonist (Tony Curtis) tries to share an apartment platonically with a dancer (Debbie Reynolds) in New York.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Grandma Pyle visits Gomer, reads his fortune and predicts Gomer will cause something bad to happen; then Sergeant Carter loses his voice while yelling at him.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After another disastrous effort from Lisa in the kitchen, Oliver implores her to take a home economics class at the local high school. Before she knows it, Lisa is a fully enrolled student...the likes of which Hooterville High has never quite seen.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Hooterville City Council appoints Oliver (Eddie Albert) to judge the apple competition at the annual fair, he mistakes the honor for a real judgeship and prepares for his time on the bench! But a run-in with the real law clarifies matters.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa visits Oliver's mother who is recovering from an illness. The doctor advises that she rest in a peaceful environment...and thinks that Hooterville sounds absolutely ideal! Of course, he doesn't know Hooterville, where peace is never…very close.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Hooterville has a still-valid contract to build war planes, he spearheads the opening of a new government defense plant. But as chaos ensues, Oliver soon wonders if the move was a big mistake after all.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is appointed as head of Hooterville's new Human Humane committee. A perfect fit for animal-lover Lisa, and a relief from her boredom in the countryside, she soon has a menagerie of both farm and exotic animals living at Green Acres.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Cuando un rico magnate inmobiliario desapareció, pareció ser un juego sucio. En su testamento, dejó instrucciones sobre lo que sucedería si moría en circunstancias violentas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante seis años, un asesino en serie merodeó por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, la agente de bienes raíces de Texas Sarah Anne Walker fue brutalmente asesinada en una casa modelo. Semanas después, se presentó un testigo que pudo haber visto al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores del hospital no pudieron determinar la causa de las alucinaciones y el intenso dolor de Bobby Curley. Lo trataron como un trastorno neurológico pero su estado se deterioró. Él estaba siendo envenenado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los investigadores examinan las cenizas de un incendio que mató a una mujer de 40 años. El fuego parecía haber sido iniciado por un cigarrillo desatendido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la policía encuentra el cuerpo de Krista Harrison, de 11 años, hay pocas pistas sobre la identidad del asesino. Pero las autoridades están intrigadas por las inusuales fibras naranjas incrustadas en la ropa que se encuentran cerca de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Post preparó un baño para su esposa antes de salir a correr. Regresó y la encontró sin respirar. Murió antes de que llegara la ambulancia. La policía consideró su muerte como accidental hasta que surgió un motivo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuarto Frío
programme.desc: Se recuenta la desaparición en 1987 de Tracy Jo Shine, residente de Houston. La investigación se enfrió hasta el 2000, cuando un 'escuadrón de casos sin resolver' se enteró de que el exnovio de la mujer, Michael Neal, se había jactado de haberla matado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesinato de un turista estadounidense en un centro turístico mexicano centró los recursos policiales en ambos lados de la frontera.

programme.desc: From Dec. 20, 2025. Featuring Parker Porter vs. Josh Copeland, Gary Balletto III vs. Skyler Mauller, plus Peter Barrett vs. Trever Bradshaw in bare-knuckle boxing action from Uncasville, Conn.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A veterinary technician chases her dream, Kelli has an uncomfortable conversation about an applicant's weight, and the women explore their new city.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Some candidates struggle to adapt to the larger stage when they finally hit the field to learn the DCC entrance, and Miranda is unnerved by criticism of her hair.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With so many strong candidates, Kelli realizes some of the cuts may not be dance-based, and media simulation day proves to be problematic for a few of the candidates.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC hopefuls try on the iconic uniform for cameos, show off their hip-hop skills for celebrity choreographer Marty Kudelka and learn table manners in an etiquette class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make the emotional final cuts, dreams come true when the 2018 DCC squad is announced, and the women hit the field for their first game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopefuls arrive at AT&T Stadium to start the rigorous audition process for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, competing for the fewest number of open spots ever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a small-town Alabama resident is murdered in his home, rumors involving a local pastor begin to swirl as the truth ends up turning the community upside down.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An Air Force captain is shot dead leaving police to suspect his wife and her Army sharpshooter lover.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a scientist is murdered in his home, detectives try to figure out why his wife and son were left unharmed.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An intruder breaks into a lawyer's home, murders his wife and blinds him; in a search for the truth, the lawyer questions his troubled son as a possible suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man who was arrested and tried three times for the death of his wife of four months talks about the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother of three married to a missionary is found dead on Valentine's Day; the investigation into the murder reveals answers close to home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan details his search for Mexican drug lord Joaquín "El Chapo" Guzmán with never-before-seen videos and photographs.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a small-town Alabama resident is murdered in his home, rumors involving a local pastor begin to swirl as the truth ends up turning the community upside down.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After losing a hotly contested custody battle, a woman disappears with her 11-month-old daughter; the child's father searches four continents for almost two decades before reaching an emotional conclusion.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The 2006 poisoning death of former Russian spy and businessman Alexander Litvinenko; an interview with the prime suspect in the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The discovery of a 19-year-old's car abandoned on a bridge in New Jersey turns into a missing person case that evolves into a monthslong homicide investigation; police discover a plot involving money, close friends and a fatal betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man steals millions of dollars by conning numerous women and businesses over 25 years; one woman brings together a group of his victims to hold him accountable and make him face justice.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Dial M For Mystery Pimp Caller?
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for a woman with the “Total Package.” And now, with only eight women left in his house, he has devised the “Total Package Challenge” to judge who offers the most.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Halitosis Ohmyosis
programme.desc: Flav challenges the final six girls to a calendar shoot showing off the bodies of the year.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Night At The Hip Hopera
programme.desc: With the latest twist still fresh and furious on the Flavorettes' minds, two new alliances quickly form in the house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Flav is so smitten with the remaining nine girls that he's going to marry them!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Neverwed Game
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls are in for a big surprise when they find themselves on the set of the first ever “Neverwed Game” starring Arsenio Hall as the host and their own ex-boyfriends!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: When Flavorettes Attack
programme.desc: Flav bring his five remaining girls to "Big Boy's Neighborhood" on LA's biggest Hip Hop Radio Station to have live callers help him decide which girl is right for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Its A Family Flav Fair
programme.desc: With only four women left vying for Flav's affection the moment of truth has arrived, meeting the parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Von Boyage
programme.desc: After the last elimination, Flav tells his final three girls to pack their bags because they are heading to Cannes, France!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Clip Show
programme.desc: Episode 14 is a clip show with never before seen footage.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Parlez Vous Flavor
programme.desc: After a season of ups and downs and a dramatic twist of plans in Cannes, it's down to Flav's final girls.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reunion After The Lovin
programme.desc: On the reunion episode, Flav and 20 girls talk about what happened on the show and what is going on in the lives right now.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Hustle on the Bustle
programme.desc: Twice unlucky in love, this time Bret Michaels leaves his mansion behind and takes twenty even more beautiful babes on tour with him to find a girlfriend who can handle his life on the road.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Fifteen Weddings And Three Funerals
programme.desc: Fifteen girls take turns reciting their own wedding vows to Bret.

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig has a problem – the recording deal he and his band won last year is about to expire, but “Downtown Sasquatch” is nowhere near ready to record. With Jimmy in the hospital, they’re missing a key member.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back with Ashley and he’s determined not to screw it up this time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley’s leaving for the summer, and the idea of their temporary farewell and the stress of writing a song for Kevin Smith’s movie -- is making him, well, nuts. So Craig decides to do whatever it takes to follow her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Spike is confused about whether she should keep her baby and whether she can remain friends with Shane, the baby's father. When her teen-mother counseling group conducts an experiment, Shane begin to realize the responsibilities of parenthood.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Feeling alone and vulnerable because her parents are always working, Lucy is pleased when a substitute teacher takes a special interest in her. However, she soon discovers that his desires go beyond simply wanting to help her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Joey makes an after-school study date with the new girl, Liz, who has a fast reputation. He prepares for the date by buying condoms, but discovers a different person than he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Spike and Shane's parents finally meet and all agree adoption is best for Spike's baby. Shane, however, has his own ideas. Meanwhile, Melanie breaks a date with Yick to go out with Snake, but her deception is discovered.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Samurai Marathon

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Percussionist Tim Adams performs. H.J. Elephant is dressed in his outerspace costume as he tells Lady Aberlin about pretending to fly to the moon. He makes a loud trumpet sound which causes alarm for X and Henrietta.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of himself and Sylvia Earle snorkeling in the ocean. Lady Elaine says she is hiding from something they are afraid of from outer space. Mister Rogers suggests when something is scary on TV, turn it off.

programme.desc: When the daughter of a police officer is kidnapped in front of her younger brother, Jane and the team race to find the girl. ANNIE WERSCHING (24) guest stars.

programme.desc: The coach of a baseball team is found dead, as the team owners and a star player battle for control of the team. Jane's brother Tommy (COLIN EGGLESFIELD) is released from jail.

programme.desc: Jane and the team investigate what appears to be a modern-day witch hunt in Salem. Meanwhile, Frankie's old girlfriend returns to town with a surprise.

programme.desc: After a mugging gone wrong, Jane and Maura delve into a family's background. Meanwhile, a romantic and mysterious figure from Maura's past shows up, causing a rift with Jane.

programme.desc: As Brenda investigates what was seen by a young hustler (GRAHAM PATRICK MARTIN), her obsession with Philip Stroh (BILLY BURKE) threatens not only her career, but also her life.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Brenda investigates a murder at the home of a multimillionaire computer company executive, pursuing leads and eventually focusing on what may be a love affair gone wrong.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The first decade of the 1900s ushers in crucial inventions that will help shape the rest of the century. Communication gets a boost as a voice is transmitted wirelessly by radio for the first time.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Saving lives and taking lives are the hallmarks of the inventions of the 1910s. From charcoal to lightly browned.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Mobsters, jazz, and turbulent economic times mark the 1920s. Silent film makes the transition to the talkies as sound comes to the silver screen. Criminals find that there's one less place to hide with the invention of the lie detector.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Though overshadowed by the Great Depression, there is no shortage of ingenuity in the 1930s. The two-way radio gets miniaturized, and the world's first portable walkie-talkie goes on the air.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: War is the driving force behind much of the innovation in the 1940s. The microwave is born after a self-taught inventor realizes that military equipment is responsible for melting a chocolate bar in his pocket.

programme.title: JFK: The Ultimate Conspiracy
programme.desc: It was one of the darkest days in American history and the most horrifying public events of the 20th century. Decades later...Kennedy's assassination, is still a global mystery that affects the world to this date.

programme.title: JFK: A President Betrayed
programme.desc: Narrated by Morgan Freeman, this film reveals new evidence how JFK embarked on secret back channel peace efforts with Nikita Khrushchev & Fidel Castro, determined to get out of Vietnam despite intense opposition inside his own government.

programme.title: Judgment At Nuremberg
programme.desc: Judge Daniel Haywood (Spencer Tracy) presides over the trial of four German jurists accused of 'legalizing' Nazi atrocities. But mounting political pressure for leniency forces Haywood into making the most difficult decision of his career.

programme.title: Lost Treasures Of The Ancient World: Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: This program visits, explores and restores such wonders as the Temples at Al Karnak and Luxor, the Temple at Abu Simnel and more.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: In 1849, a man suddenly disappeared in Bermondsey. The discovery that he had been brutally murdered enraptured the press and the public.

programme.title: Hereditary
programme.desc: When the matriarch of the Graham family passes away, her daughter (Toni Collette) and grandchildren begin to unravel cryptic and increasingly terrifying secrets about their ancestry, trying to outrun the sinister fate they have inherited.

programme.title: Talk to Me
programme.desc: When a group of friends discover how to conjure spirits with an embalmed hand, they become hooked on the new thrill, unleashing terrifying supernatural forces, in the eye-popping, nightmarish debut from filmmakers Danny & Michael Philippou.

programme.title: It Comes At Night
programme.desc: After a mysterious apocalypse leaves the world with few survivors, two families forced to share a home form an uneasy alliance in an attempt to keep the outside evil at bay—only to learn that the true horror may come from within.

programme.title: X
programme.desc: A group of actors set out to make an adult film in rural Texas under the noses of their reclusive hosts, but when the elderly couple catches their young guests in the act, the cast finds themselves in a desperate fight for their lives.

programme.title: Pearl: An X-traordinary Origin Story
programme.desc: Trapped on her family's isolated farm, Pearl must tend to her ailing father under the bitter, overbearing watch of her devout mother. Lusting for the glamorous life she's seen in the movies, Pearl's temptations and repressions collide.

programme.title: Villains
programme.desc: After a pair of amateur criminals break into a suburban home, they stumble upon a dark secret that two sadistic homeowners will do anything to keep from getting out.

programme.title: The Innkeepers
programme.desc: After over one hundred years of service, The Yankee Pedlar Inn is shutting its doors for good. The last remaining employees - Claire and Luke - are determined to uncover proof of what many believe to be one of New England's most haunted hotels.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: Former best friends must join forces and take the battle from the consoles to the streets when an army of aliens attacks Earth with massive video game characters.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A playboy tries to win over the girl of his dreams when he discovers she has no short-term memory.

programme.title: The Cobbler
programme.desc: Max Simkin has had enough of working in his little New York shoe repair shop where he quietly envies people with more interesting lives.

programme.title: Chef
programme.desc: A troubled chef looks to reignite his passion for cooking by launching a food truck in this spicy film.

programme.title: Rain Man

programme.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape

programme.desc: After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Hyper-accelerated aliens, invisible to the naked eye, take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: On a planet doomed to destruction, Kirk, Spock, and McCoy become involved with two aliens who use them as laboratory animals in a bizarre series of tests on an alien empath who may be the savior of her planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock deliver medicine to an insane asylum where a former Starfleet captain is being held. They discover that he has freed the inmates and is running the place.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise hosts two alien beings from the same planet who share an intense and self-destructive hatred of each other.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: An alien criminal from the other side of the wormhole tempts Odo by telling the shape-shifter he can put the changeling in contact with others like himself.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko, Kira, and Bashir are stranded in a war-torn world where it is impossible for the combatants to die.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Chief O'Brien is reluctantly "adopted" as a spiritual leader by a Bajoran village that annually follows the "Storyteller" to fight a demon of the town's collective fears.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A stubborn old Bajoran farmer forces Kira to take a good look at how much she has changed since her alliance with the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When members of the station find their fantasies coming to life, it becomes the prelude to a very real danger, which threatens everyone.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While an alien entity wreaks havoc with the station's computer, the irrepressible Lwaxana Troi sets her sights on romance--with Odo.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo is caught in the middle when an alien influence pits Kira against Sisko in a deadly power struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira is forced to re-examine her post-occupation prejudices about Cardassians when her running battle of wits with a jailed man claiming to be a notorious death camp leader is actually his remorseful file clerk.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When a Bajoran spiritual leader objects to Keiko's secular teachings, she threatens to destroy the alliance between Bajor and the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Relieved of her post and sent back to Bajor, Kira helps to reveal the hidden force behind The Circle—and a greater secret that could destroy them all.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While Sisko leads a daring last stand against the Bajoran takeover forces, Kira and Dax embark on a desperate mission to reveal the truth about the coup.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The crew must fight for Jadzia's life when a desperate Trill takes the group hostage and steals the Dax symbiont.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A young Cardassian, orphaned in the war and raised by Bajorans, causes turmoil on the station when his people attempt to reclaim him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: A spatial distortion leaves Archer unable to form any new long-term memories. Years in the future, he wakes up one morning and is stunned to learn the outcome of the human-Xindi conflict.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: When Trip suffers a catastrophic injury, his only hope for survival is a transplant from a "mimetic simbiote" which Phlox grows from one of his exotic creatures.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer and T'Pol travel back in time to 2004 Detroit to stop a Xindi plot.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Religious zealots hijack Enterprise to use it as a weapon against the enemies of their faith.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.desc: Archer sets out on a suicide mission to destroy the Xindi superweapon as Enterprise faces a brutal attack.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Investigating a planet applying for membership into the Federation, the crew of the Enterprise finds a group of inhabitants who used to be soldiers but now fight for their very existence.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.desc: The Atlantis long-range sensors detect the signal of a subspace tracking device familiar to Dr. McKay. The team follows to signal to a damaged hive ship drifting in space. Amidst the ship’s records, they discover references to a secret Wraith base.
